name: Integration - Error handling for LLM failure in analyze_planetary_comparison
description: Simulates an LLM failure during the analyze_planetary_comparison method and verifies error handling and fallback response.
input: Force LLMService.generate_response to raise an exception during /query endpoint call.
output: A QueryResponse with success=False, result set to FALLBACK_RESPONSE, error message indicating LLM error, and tips.
success_criteria: tips suggests retrying or checking LLM config
